Module dk.tij.registermaschine.core

module dk.tij.registermaschine.core
The core engine of the Registermaschine system.

This module provides a complete virtualised execution environment, including a compilation pipeline, a configurable instruction set, and a runtime executor.

Module Structure

The module is organised into five functional pillars:
  • Compilation: Lexing, parsing, and binary code generation.
  • Configuration: XML-based initialisation and hardware constraints.
  • Instructions: The operational logic (Arithmetic, I/O, Control Flow).
  • Conditions: Guarded execution logic using Boolean algebra.
  • Runtime: The virtual CPU, register bank, and execution loop.

Encapsulation Policy

Internal implementation details located in *.internal.* packages hidden from the module path to ensure binary compatibility and maintain strict architectural boundaries.

Extending the Instruction Set

To implement custom hardware operations, follow these steps:
  1. Extend AbstractInstruction to define the execution logic.
  2. Register the new instruction in the .jxml configuration file mapping it to a unique opcode.
  3. (Optional) Implement ICondition to create specialised execution guards.

Service Provider Interface (SPI)

The configuration system is designed for modularity. Use the .api packages to implement custom logic that integrates with the central CoreConfigParser
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Concrete implementations for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.

    Public API for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.

    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Provides logical composition of conditions using Boolean algebra.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api
    Provides the fundamental interfaces for conditional instruction execution.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config
    Provides the central configuration and initialisation logic for the Registermaschine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api
    Defines the contract for configuration parsers within the Registermaschine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error
    Defines the exception hierarchy for the Registermaschine engine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Provides concrete implementations of the standard Registermaschine instructions.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api
    Defines the core interfaces and base classes for the Registermaschine's instruction set.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime
    Provides the concrete implementation of the machine's runtime environment and instruction execution engine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api
    Defines the core interfaces for the Registermaschine's execution environment.
